ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Ex Parte Petition To Increase Bond
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Ex Parte Petition To Increase Bond
Off Calendar May-22-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order To Produce Contents Of Decedents Google Accounts
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Gene Marchi.

Ms. Fox stated that they found a bit more cash and some more Creditors, that $40,000.00 went out, that they sold a property and that she will file an ex parte petition to increase bond based on the unexpected increase in sale of the property. The Court granted the Petition for Order to Produce Contents of Decedents Google Accounts (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-22-2016 Granted Per Written Order
